ticker: Tracking political accountability in real time

value.title: ICE Agents Deployed to Airports Amid TSA Staffing Crisis and Budget Disputes
value.summary: ICE agents are being deployed to U.S. airports as TSA faces significant staffing shortages during an ongoing funding dispute. The move raises questions about immigration enforcement expanding into airport security operations.
value.analysis: This deployment likely signals increased immigration enforcement in travel hubs and may face legal challenges from civil liberties groups. The intersection of staffing shortages and funding fights could lead to prolonged airport disruptions and intensified political debate over agency roles.
